reviews.title: The hotel robbed customers off!
reviews.text:
If you travel with kids, please make sure you check their quoting price and policies for extra bed before booking cos it could be very subjective by the hotel’s wish- especially when you have paid in full before arrival.
Our family is frequent travelers, and we have used agoda service for almost 15 years, however this is the first time I write negative comment about a hotel. 
With a good experience of service in Vinpearl Can Tho hotel 2 years ago,  I decided to have 1 night in this hotel again last Thursday. From my 15 years experience using agoda service, it will be very difficult to find a hotel with a room for 4 adults, thats why I always book for 2 adults-room and pay extra fee for extra beds for my two kids - 1 is 16 years old and 1 is 12 - when check-in. It works perfectly well for all hotels and resorts from 3-5 stars locally (including Vinpearl hotels and resorts) and internationally over last 15 years until last Thursday at Vinpearl Can Tho hotel as they quoted us any price that they wanted for extra beds/ additional room with the attitude as “this is our game- you can take it or leave it”. At check-in counter, I was informed that by hotel policies, its not allowed to have two extra beds in one room (and the room is spacious at 45m2!!!), and they asked me to buy another room at cost of VND 2.5mil ( whilst the room I bought is only VND 1.7mil). I did not agree with that coz it was not mentioned in the booking from the beginning and we had to supervise our kids . After debating for a while, a front desk supervisor appeared, she agreed to set up 2 extra beds in the room,  the cost we had to pay for this set up is another VND 2.5 mil on top of VND 1.7mil we paid (made total cost for 1 night is 4.2 mil) and with this set up ofcourse hotel’s policies that they mentioned from the beginning was no longer a policy- and the cost for 02 extra bed is higher than the room cost which was only VND 1.7mil. Ofcourse, we did not agree as obviously they tried to make money o

reviews.title: Disappointing for a 5-Star
reviews.text:
It's all in the details.  Staff reception upon arrival is decent, you will be handed a small glass of refreshing lemon grass infused water and the lobby ceilings are quite high.  However the layout of the hotel is not too inspiring.  The Swimming Pool is located on the 6th floor and above it on the 7th you will find the Spa and the Fitness Center.  The pool is large enough to accommodate a party however we found the pool to be quite dirty.  We did not use the fitness center so I cannot comment on that, though it looked clean and well maintained.

Our room sat on the 27th floor and the view from there should have been spectacular if it were not for the choice of window framing and glass style.  It felt cheap, such a beautiful view obstructed by poor design and the bathtub still had residue from what appears to be construction material. Simply not things you would want to run into in a 5-star experience, where details are everything.

Oh, and we got food poisoning.

reviews.title: Sheraton- a terrible experience
reviews.text:
I stayed at Sheriton from 10 to12th of April. I booked the room for my parents and me as 3 guests, but the staffs only gave us the amenities for only one to two guests such as one tooth brush, one pair of slippers, ect...

When I informed the staffs, one of the staffs told us to use the bottle from the bathroom instead of giving us three bottles as we booked three guests.

The hotel had a beautiful view, but the shower didn't work properly as the button was malfunctioned.

Room was spacious, facilities looked clean, gym was very nice and swimming pool was great. 

The only thing I believe Sheraton can improve is the staffs and customer service training.

Thank you.

Kính Gửi Quý Khách manhdu !
Chúng tôi vô cùng biết ơn vì những ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách liên quan tới thời gian quý khách nghỉ tại Vinpearl Hotel Cần Thơ.
Đồng thời Ban Quản Lý khách sạn cũng ghi nhận vấn đề về chất lượng món ăn và dịch vụ khách sạn mà quý khách đã nêu ra. Chúng tôi mong muốn nhận được thêm các thông tin chi tiết hơn về dịch vụ khách sạn để chúng tôi có thể xem xét và khắc phục điều này trong thời gian sắp tới. Nhận xét của quý khách là thước đo, đồng thời là nguồn động lực để chúng tôi tiếp tục làm tốt hơn, đáp ứng kỳ vọng và yêu cầu, thị hiếu ngày càng cao của khách hàng

Cảm ơn quý khách một lần nữa vì đã chia sẻ cảm nhận của quý khách và chúng tôi sẽ đảm bảo để chuyến đi lần tới của quý khách sẽ nhiều trải nghiệm tuyệt vời hơn.
Trân Trọng,
Vương Quốc Tuấn
Trưởng Bộ phận Tiền sảnh

reviews.title: Coming back here for sure!
reviews.positives: The room was excellent with a big window view of the city and canal.  Plenty of room, fridge, TV, and wifi.  The pool was beautiful and the poolside service excellent.  Everyone at the hotel was friendly and helpful.  Plus you ave the shopping mall right next door.  Truly a great ending to our vacation.
reviews.negatives: I can’t think of anything 🤷🏻‍♀️

reviews.title: Poor amenities, but brilliant staff
reviews.text: Honestly speaking I was expecting 5* hotel experience. Unfortunately, it did'n't happened. Let's start from the very beginning: when we entered our room, there was +27 C degrees inside. We have tried to cool down the temperature in the room and... after 1.5 hours temperature decreased only to +26 C although we have set A/C for blowing +5 C weather. We have called to reception, they send us the technician guy, who was trying to fix the A/C. From this place the most interesting happens: you can set any temperature in your room, it doesn't change anything, because conditioning system in the hotel is central and you can't really lower temperature in the room. The only solution which was given by the hotel was to change the room in another, where sun is not shining to the windows. Okay, we have changed our room, but even there after 3 hours of consistant air conditioning temperature inside the room was +22 C.  Of course, it was much better than +26 C, but it couldn't happen in 5* hotel
reviews.response:
Dear Mr.Arunas !

It was our pleasure to have you here and thank you for taking time to share you valuable personal experience with us. However, We have noted on your constructive comments on the hotel's facilities and further review this for improvement. 
We are very concerned when reading your feedback about your experience during your recent stay. Certainly what you experienced with regards to the Air conditioner issue is not acceptable by any means, and in no way up to our standards. I have personally discussed your feedback with our Management that the maintenance program needs to be carried out consistently. 
We truly appreciate your taking the time to highlight and share your experience as this greatly assists us in our continuous effort to improve and maintain our standards. We hope this experience has not marred your overall impression of the Vinpearl Can Tho Hotel and look forward to welcome you back in the near future.

reviews.text: This is an excellent business type hotel. I would give it a  4 star as far as building, quality of fixture. There is some little QA issue such as you need to turn on the bath  faucet to green side to use hot water as the red one is for cold water. I dont know if anybody uses the bath tub at all as it seems to take a long time to fill the bath tub with warm water. We had to take a taxi evey night to Ninh Kieu quay as the hotel location is 2 kms away.  There are 2 restaurants but none of them worth  any eating  in terms of quality/price.. i tried a fresh springroll as an afternoon snack at the Vietnamese restaurant ; the roll was completely bland, no herb and took 20 minutes waiting time and for  120,000 dong.. The chinese dim sum is freshly prepared but cant be as authentic as we found  as in most dim sun joints in North America. IIn summsry, I would consider to stay on leasure at  75% rack discount rate and  I would not  use any restaurant service on site.

Hotel is good. I voted for 4 stars. But I not happy with one thing: I booked just one night on 7th October 2018 on Agoda. When I want to make a call phone outside to my friends, I could not do that with phone in room although I tried many times with the intructuons on phone. At the moments, I used sim card oversea so I could not make a call phone. I called to service center. Thay said that, because I booked on Agoda, only one night. They did not take deposit from me. Therefore, they blocked the phone that why I could not call outside. It means If you booked online and paid already the hotel will limited services in room with walking guests????
I used to work in Hotel as receptionist and have traveled many places in Vietnam and oversea. All services will be charged and then down to computer system when They check out receptionist have to charged them. It is too expnesive to pay or I will run away not pay the call phone?

reviews.text: The experience of Tet at Sheraton Can Tho is always a wonderful vacation experience. A very special point is that the receptionists and staff remember regular customers. They greet warmly and the check-in process is quick and smooth. The room with a beautiful view was very pleasing. The room is clean and fragrant. There is a gift of various types of Tet jam that tastes very good. The location is very convenient for catching a taxi. My mother has insomnia. Yet, whenever she lies on the hotel bed, she always sleeps soundly. She woke up and proudly said that it had been a long time since she slept so well. The room is cool, so my mother sleeps deeply. Thank you to the hotel for always providing excellent service. It will always be my first and only choice when I return to Can Tho.

reviews.title: Going back to the hometown with mom.
reviews.text: On the occasion of the memorial trip home with my mother, I booked a car to Can Tho and arrived at the hotel by 10 am. My mother was worried that we wouldn't be able to check in. The surprise was that the hotel arranged an early check-in for us. The river view was very beautiful from the 20th floor. My mother loved it and took pictures as soon as we entered the room. The staff were very helpful with the check-in process and assisting us with carrying our luggage upstairs. As soon as we entered the room, a staff member brought us two cool lotus seed desserts that were light and mildly sweet, suitable for older people. The breakfast was very tasty and diverse. Around 10 am the next day, the check-out process was very quick. Ah, this time my mother forgot to bring her ID card, but luckily she had her VNEID with a picture of her electronic ID, and the hotel accepted it, so my mother was very happy. In this experience, the hotel staff were very enthusiastic in promoting the 6th-floor pool and bar, and my mother insisted on going up to take commemorative photos. I will always choose the Sheraton Hotel as my vacation spot whenever I return to Can Tho, especially since the rooms are very spacious and luxurious, and the price is very reasonable.

reviews.title: Great stay for a good price
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at Sheridan Can Tho, and I must say, it exceeded all my expectations! From the moment I arrived, the staff was incredibly welcoming and attentive, making me feel right at home. The rooms were spacious, beautifully decorated, and spotlessly clean, with all the amenities you could possibly need for a comfortable stay.

The location is perfect, offering stunning views of the city and easy access to all the local attractions. The breakfast was absolutely delicious, with a wide variety of options to suit every taste. I also appreciated the hotel’s commitment to quality service and making sure every guest felt valued.

What truly stood out was the exceptional hospitality. The staff went above and beyond to ensure my stay was perfect. I highly recommend Sheridan Can Tho to anyone visiting the area — it’s a hidden gem that delivers a top-notch experience. Will definitely be back!

reviews.title: going to celebrate Tet with mom
reviews.text: This year, I'm back to praise the hotel for its attentive service, starting from the security department helping with guests' luggage when they get off the car. I commend the quick check-in and check-out process. The room is clean and modern. I appreciate that the refrigerator this time has a cold ice tray inside, allowing me to store my diabetes medication and drink cold water comfortably. The Mekong restaurant in the hotel provides delicious food and attentive service, offering buttered bread while waiting for the kitchen to prepare meals promptly. The breakfast buffet is diverse, unique, and delicious. There was even a handwritten note from the manager thanking the customers and a plate of Tet jam to enjoy in the room. Very thoughtful.
